pages.text: The $(item)Lush Skyseed$() — moss and azalea. Moss comes from an $(bold)Ancient island$(); the first azalea from a $(bold)Forest's$() bushes.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A cave garden afloat. Moss over rooted dirt, azalea trees above, and a tangle of roots, vines, and spore blossoms hanging beneath.

$(bold)Greenery$()$(br)Big and small $(item)dripleaves$(), $(item)moss$(), $(item)glow berries$() on the underside, and the two sniffer plants — $(item)torchflower$() and $(item)pitcher plant$(). A small pool collects in the moss, where $(item)axolotls$() swim.
$(bold)Looks$()$(br)Garden, glow (berry-laden underside), and ancient-garden (spore blossoms). Moss comes from an Ancient island; the first azalea from a Forest sprinkle.
